title: error.rs wh_error_name table wrong: all codes -2001..-2015 misnamed
description: wh_error_name() in error.rs maps codes -2001 through -2015 to wrong symbolic names. The actual wh_error.h has a gap after -2011 (WH_ERROR_REQUEST_PENDING) and resumes at -2100 (WH_ERROR_LOCKED). Examples: -2001 is WH_ERROR_NOTREADY (not ABORTED), -2002 is WH_ERROR_ABORTED (not NOTREADY), -2005 is WH_ERROR_CERT_VERIFY (not NOTVERIFIED), -2010 is WH_ERROR_TIMEOUT (not NOSPC), codes -2012 through -2015 do not exist. Every Error::Wh diagnostic message for these codes displays the wrong name, causing misleading logs and error messages.
